post.description:
Authorize the start of a deployment based on Camunda candidateStarterGroups.
Slot types mirror the start-deployment chain (`/rest/auth/process-definition/:deploymentName/start`)
since express-swagger picks this handler as the operation's terminal annotation source.

Run a deployment synchronously and respond with the engine's final output.
Slot types mirror the start-deployment chain (`/start/sync/:deploymentName`)
since this handler is wired as the terminal of `middleware.start(runToEnd)`.
Signal a waiting activity and run the engine to completion.

executionId.description: Activity execution id, required when signalling a parallel multi-instance tasks

enableDummyService.description: true returns dummy service function for service task if not found

step.description: true forces activity runs to go forward in steps, defaults to false

strict.description: strict mode, see documentation, defaults to false

batchSize.description: positive integer to control parallel loop batch size, defaults to 50

disableTrackState.description:
disable tracking state between recover and resume
true will only return state for elements that are actually running
Defaults to falsy

executing.description: Activity executions, e.g. executing multi-instance tasks or event definitions
